mapper.sql: from asset_info a left join sys_dept scope_dept on scope_dept.dept_id = a.use_org_dept_id left join sys_user scope_user on scope_user.user_id = a.current_user_id

from asset_operate_order o left join ( select x.order_id, d.dept_id from ( select order_id, apply_dept_id as dept_id from asset_operate_order where apply_dept_id is not null union all select order_id, from_dept_id as dept_id from asset_operate_order where from_dept_id is not null union all select order_id, to_dept_id as dept_id from asset_operate_order where to_dept_id is not null ) x inner join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = x.dept_id ) scope_dept on scope_dept.order_id = o.order_id left join sys_user apply_user on apply_user.user_id = o.apply_user_id

from asset_inventory_task t left join asset_location scope_location on scope_location.location_id = t.target_location_id left join sys_dept scope_dept on scope_dept.dept_id = ifnull(t.target_dept_id, scope_location.dept_id) left join sys_user scope_user on scope_user.user_id = t.owner_user_id

from asset_event_log e left join asset_info a on a.asset_id = e.asset_id left join sys_dept scope_dept on scope_dept.dept_id = a.use_org_dept_id left join sys_user scope_user on scope_user.user_id = a.current_user_id
mapper.select:
select count(distinct o.order_id)
o.del_flag = '0' and o.order_status not in ('DONE', 'CANCELED', 'REJECTED') ${params.dataScope}

select count(distinct t.task_id)
t.del_flag = '0' and t.task_status not in ('FINISHED', 'CLOSED') ${params.dataScope}

select count(distinct i.item_id) from asset_inventory_task_item i inner join asset_inventory_task t on t.task_id = i.task_id and t.del_flag = '0' left join asset_location scope_location on scope_location.location_id = t.target_location_id left join sys_dept scope_dept on scope_dept.dept_id = ifnull(t.target_dept_id, scope_location.dept_id) left join sys_user scope_user on scope_user.user_id = t.owner_user_id
t.task_status = 'FINISHED' and i.inventory_result is not null and i.inventory_result <> 'NORMAL' and (i.process_status is null or i.process_status = 'PENDING') ${params.dataScope}
